gate.speaker: Nikita
gate.text:
Ah… the oppression of the real world.
I should probably get dressed first…

fail.text:
You woke them up!
Mission failed.

toilet.speaker: Sveta
toilet.text: It's 5 AM. WHY are you flushing the toilet.

failMessages.text: You woke them up! Mission failed.
The cat saw everything. You've been judged.
She opened one eye. That's worse than both.

intro.text: The kitchen. Step one: become operational.

intro.speaker: Igor
intro.text: You know… BJJ is basically the new yoga for tech elites.

intro.speaker: Nikita
intro.text: Yeah. But with more existential pressure.

intro.speaker: Igor
intro.text: Lol, heard about the new 'Sentient' mode in OpenClaw?

round1.flavor: Oh no… I've been flamboyantly entangled in Igor's Deluxe Grip of Existential Doom.

choices.name: Flamingo Triangle
choices.description: A move of elegance, balance, and unexpected flexibility.

choices.name: Disco Inferno Armbar
choices.description: Burns with the passion of a thousand dance floors.

choices.name: Twirling Octopus
choices.description: Eight limbs of confusion. Well, four. But it feels like eight.

round2.flavor: He's coming back for more. This time with renewed vigor and questionable technique.

choices.name: Rear Naked Choke 🤗
choices.description: Just a friendly hug… that slowly becomes not so friendly.

choices.name: Flying Pink Triangle 🌈
choices.description: Launches into the air with confidence, grace, and absolutely no regard for consequences.

choices.name: Arm Bar Americana 🍺☕🇺🇸
choices.description: A powerful fusion of cultures. Freedom, caffeine, and joint isolation.

round3.flavor: I regret everything… but also… this might work.

choices.name: Final Form Armbar
choices.description: This isn't even my final form. Wait — yes it is.

choices.name: Existential Sweep
choices.description: Sweeps the leg. And the meaning of life.

choices.name: Vibes-Based Control
choices.description: No technique. Only vibes. Somehow it works.

postRound2.speaker: Igor
postRound2.text: That's not even a real move.

lockerChange.speaker: Nikita
lockerChange.text:
Bright white. Blue belt. Fresh laundry smell.
I look incredible.

senseiGreet.speaker: Nashebo
senseiGreet.text: Igor's warming up at the far end. Don't keep him waiting.

matGate.speaker: Nikita
matGate.text: Can't step on the mat in street clothes. Need to change first.

intro.text: Time to make AI that makes AI.

slack.speaker: Customer
slack.text: We need AI to replace all human managers.

morningIntro.text: Time to drive to the dojo.

morningIntro.speaker: Nikita
morningIntro.text:
Dutch roads... cyclists everywhere.
One wrong move and it's game over.

Use UP/DOWN to switch lanes.
Avoid cars and bikes.

eveningIntro.text: Almost home. Just survive the cyclists... again.

crashMessages.text: The cyclist wins. They always win.
Insurance is going to love this.
Elon did not prepare me for this.

greeting.speaker: Nikita
greeting.text: Built an AI. It became sentient. Fixed it.

introCrawl.text:
Episode 31
A Day in the Life

In his 30th year, Nikita achieved what few dare attempt:

He married.
He bought a house.
He acquired a Tesla.
He started making AI that makes AI.

Having conquered the chaos of uncertainty,
and tied together the loose ends of existence,

he now faces his greatest challenge:

his daily routine.
